rows.label: tlk70000070_02_msg0001
rows.name:
My son and I are barely
getting by here, but we're
managing somehow.

rows.label: tlk70000070_02_msg0002
rows.name:
Oh, by the by, is it true
that Felt Village was destroyed
by this Grail character?

rows.label: tlk70000070_02_msg0003
rows.name:
Things were already bad enough
here. Without any trade with Felt,
I'm not sure how we'll manage...

rows.label: tlk70000070_02_msg0004
rows.name:
The Iiran king is liked in capital,
but his reach doesn't extend to
remote villages like this.

rows.label: tlk70000070_02_msg0005
rows.name:
Maybe if we got a new king
things'd be different, but who
can really say for sure...
